seedanceSegments.title: Crunch shower hook
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first opening: crunchy pistachio-caper crumbs hit glossy orecchiette and burrata cream, then a quick final-bowl context beat clarifies the dish.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context, not as camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead macro view for the crunch shower. Use @KitchenIslandDefault only for final island material continuity if the camera widens. Use @FinalDishVisual only as the finished dish identity: lemon butter orecchiette, torn burrata, pistachio-caper crunch, basil, lemon zest, black pepper. Use @CrispyPistachioCaperCrumb only as the coarse topping texture reference. Use @Spoon only as the spoon shape for the single cream drag. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to keep one visible Licorn hand controlling the spoon, not a floating utensil. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo island, same cabinet layout, no invented surfaces. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, sexy macro food-porn texture, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music, only close kitchen ASMR. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s coarse golden crumbs, wrinkled capers and chopped green pistachios rain onto one glossy orecchiette shell; 0.8-1.6s slight pullback clarifies torn burrata cream beside lemon-butter orecchiette; 1.6-2.8s one visible Licorn hand uses the spoon to drag one shell through thick white burrata cream, one simple motion; 2.8-3.8s hard cut overhead final bowl context on terrazzo island; 3.8-5.0s macro crumbs stick to cream and yellow zest threads; 5.0-6.0s one shell glistens with sauce inside its cup; 6.0-7.0s final crunchy cream macro hold. Scale lock: orecchiette are 2-3 cm small ear-shaped cups, not spaghetti, not penne, not oversized shells; burrata cream is thick, not watery. Global negatives: no slicing, no fork lift, no floating spoon, no extra hands, no text, no music, no spaghetti.

seedanceSegments.title: Roasted pistachio caper crunch
seedanceSegments.description: Supplemental pistachio-roasting step, rough chop, and crispy caper-panko-parmesan topping.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @InductionCloseup as the active hot-pan view for roasting and crisping. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead view only for chopping. Use @wok only as the wide pan shape for roasting pistachios and crisping crumbs. Use @chef_knife only as the knife shape. Use @cutting_board only as the chopping board surface. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible Licorn hands for chopping and pan actions. Use @CrispyPistachioCaperCrumb only as the target finished coarse topping. Kitchen continuity lock: black flush induction, light terrazzo island, no flame. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels ASMR food style, close detail shots, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music, only nut scatter, knife chop and pan scrape. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s raw pistachios tumble into dry hot pan; 0.9-1.8s one pan shake, pistachio edges toast brown while green interiors stay visible; 1.8-3.0s hard cut overhead, knife chops roasted pistachios into 2-5 mm irregular chunks; 3.0-4.0s butter and olive oil shimmer in pan; 4.0-5.5s breadcrumbs, capers, thyme, parmesan, chili and pistachios scrape together; 5.5-6.8s topping turns coarse golden-green with wrinkled capers; 6.8-8.0s finished crunchy topping slides into a shallow dish. Scale lock: pistachio pieces are chunky 2-5 mm, not green powder, not herbs; topping quantity is a generous mound, not a sparse dusting. Global negatives: no burnt black crumbs, no wet paste, no floating knife, no flames, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Orecchiette boil
seedanceSegments.description: Boil orecchiette, reserve starchy water and drain while preserving the small ear shape.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @InductionWide as the setup view for the pot on the black induction plate. Use @InductionCloseup as the active boiling close-up. Use @SaucepanLarge only as the large pot shape. Use @Tongs only as the utensil for lifting and showing pasta. Use @OrecchietteAlDenteReference only as the pasta shape and scale reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible hands when pasta is poured or water is reserved. Kitchen continuity lock: black flush induction, no flame, same Licorn kitchen surfaces. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, detail-heavy, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music, only rolling boil, pasta pour and draining. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s induction and pot setup with steam; 0.8-2.0s orecchiette pours into rolling salted water, small concave ear shapes visible; 2.0-3.2s shells tumble in bubbles, no long noodles; 3.2-4.2s cloudy pasta water is reserved in a cup; 4.2-5.8s drained orecchiette steams, firm cup shape intact; 5.8-7.0s tongs lift a small cluster showing sauce-catching cups. Scale lock: orecchiette are 2-3 cm small ear-shaped cups, not spaghetti, not penne, not giant shells, not miniature grains. Global negatives: no flames, no spaghetti, no penne, no mushy pasta, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Brown lemon butter hiss
seedanceSegments.description: Brown butter foams amber, garlic blooms, lemon hisses and zest brightens the sauce.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @InductionCloseup as the active sauce close-up view. Use @wok only as the wide skillet/pan shape for browning butter. Use @Spoon only as the stirring and trail-check utensil. Use @BrownButterLemonEmulsion only as the target sauce state: amber butter, lemon gloss, tiny browned speckles. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands while adding garlic and lemon. Kitchen continuity lock: black flush induction, no flames, same Licorn kitchen. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels ASMR macro food style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music, only butter sizzle, lemon hiss and spoon drag. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s diced butter drops into hot pan; 0.8-2.0s butter foams pale and bubbly; 2.0-3.2s foam collapses into glossy amber with brown milk solids; 3.2-4.2s minced garlic scatters and blooms pale, not burnt; 4.2-5.4s lemon juice hits with a visible hiss and steam; 5.4-6.6s lemon zest threads fall bright yellow into the sauce; 6.6-8.0s spoon draws a thin glossy amber trail through the finished sauce. Color lock: brown butter is warm amber with nutty speckles, not black, not pale yellow. Global negatives: no burnt garlic, no black butter, no flames, no thick cheese sauce, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Burrata break and pistachio rain
seedanceSegments.description: Main sexy food-porn plating: burrata lands, opens, cream spills, basil and crunchy pistachio-caper topping rain down.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active plating and hero island view. Use @LemonButterOrecchietteGlossy only as the sauced pasta base state. Use @BurrataOpenedReference only as the burrata tear and cream texture reference. Use @CrispyPistachioCaperCrumb only as the crunchy topping reference. Use @Spoon only as the spoon shape for splitting burrata and sprinkling topping. Use @zester only as the lemon-zest tool shape. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible Licorn hands. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo island, same bowl position, no surface redesign. Generate exactly 8 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 10 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, very sexy creamy-crunchy food-porn macro, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music, only burrata plop, cheese tear, crumb rain, zest rasp and pepper crack. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s one palm-sized burrata ball lands gently on the hot glossy orecchiette mound; 1.0-2.6s spoon splits the burrata skin and thick stracciatella cream spills into shell cups; 2.6-3.6s torn basil leaves fall, several visible pieces; 3.6-5.2s two spoonfuls of crunchy caper-pistachio topping rain thickly over the open burrata; 5.2-6.6s macro crunch sticks to cream and lemon butter; 6.6-7.8s lemon zest threads rasp over the top; 7.8-8.8s parmesan and black pepper specks fall; 8.8-10.0s creamy-crunchy final plated state holds briefly. Scale lock: burrata is one 8-10 cm palm-sized ball, not tiny pearls; topping is visible coarse chunks, not dust; orecchiette remain 2-3 cm cups. Global negatives: no melted cheese blob, no watery burrata, no tiny garnish drift, no hand-food fusion, no text, no music.
